title: Blender License
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for external asset-authoring executables in the OpenClinXR asset generation pipeline.
claims_supported: Blender is released under the GNU General Public License.
The Blender manual states that the GPL applies to the Blender application and not to artwork created with it.
claims_not_supported: That Blender can be embedded in an OpenClinXR production runtime without additional distribution review.
That every Blender add-on or script has the same license posture as Blender itself.
That OpenClinXR may redistribute Blender binaries without legal and packaging review.
